query:
SELECT 
  tc.id,
  tc.organizationId,
  tc.sectionName,
  tc.taskId,
  tc.completed,
  tc.completedAt,
  tc.notionLastEdited
FROM taskCompletion tc
WHERE tc.id = (SELECT id FROM taskCompletion ORDER BY notionLastEdited DESC LIMIT 1)
  OR tc.notionLastEdited > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
ORDER BY tc.notionLastEdited DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT 
  tc.id,
  tc.organizationId,
  tc.sectionName,
  tc.taskId,
  tc.completed,
  tc.completedAt,
  tc.notionLastEdited
FROM taskCompletion tc
WHERE tc.id = (SELECT id FROM taskCompletion ORDER BY notionLastEdited DESC LIMIT 1)
  OR tc.notionLastEdited > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
ORDER BY tc.notionLastEdited DESC
LIMIT 20;
